title: Pride
original_title: プライド　運命の瞬間
overview: Based on the International Military Tribunal for the Far East of 1946–48, depicts Japanese prime minister Hideki Tojo as a family man who fought to defend Japan and Asia from western colonialism but was ultimately hanged by a vengeful United States.

trailers.title: プライド～運命の瞬間～　特報・予告編
